$schema_note: Declarative GitHub Actions permissions for selected-actions mode (BB-009). Applied by infra/github/scripts/apply-governance.sh when --apply is used against a remote.

notes: Repo policy checker (scripts/validate-github-governance.mjs) enforces 40-char SHA pins in .github/workflows.
verified_allowed is false so only explicit patterns (plus GitHub-owned) may run; expand patterns deliberately.
Prefer pinning every uses: line to an immutable commit SHA even for GitHub-owned actions.
